title: Small Cat Statues
description: This mod adds a variety of small, mysterious cat statues that naturally generate in Forest, Taiga, and Jungle biomes
body:
This mod adds a variety of small, mysterious cat statues that naturally generate in Forest, Taiga, and Jungle biomes.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b9d379d49ab6a777e93a26c973fe61f695a80fd.jpeg)

Occasionally, these statues may contain hidden loot within them, so it's always worth exploring them during your adventures.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/244497b5f4f0f0263dc0b5232279a01f514dae41.jpeg)

The Cat Statues can spawn in the normal Forest biome, all types of Jungle, and all types of Taiga biomes.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a181d171b04fd5b1758b81880e4a6fe74521bf54.jpeg)



Feel free to put it in your modpack!
